prompt_v3.directive_placement: after evidence JSON, frozen to D4B V6 wording
prompt_v3.safety_coupling: must only be used on evidence that passed D4A drift rejection

f7_fix.alias_ordering: specific keys precede ambiguous ones; robotic-arm regressions hold

P1_paired_drift_rejected.evidence: real D3C drifted track + D4A flag

P2_control_no_drift_gate.meaning: demonstrated false positive; D4A necessity proven

d4c1_d4c2_factorization.reproducibility_note: n=1 per cell, no repeat sampling under no-retry policy; dynamic occurred twice, both in the same pocket

finding_F8.finding: prompt v3 directive compliance is brittle and non-literal: implicit speed x entity decision boundary (dynamic only at entity!=humanoid and speed=160); the stated >=10 px/s rule is ignored; humanoid entity class suppresses dynamic even at 160 px/s
finding_F8.implication: VLM layer is not a reliable dynamic-risk classifier via prompting alone; candidates are VLM finetuning or sinking the dynamic decision into a symbolic rule over validated evidence
